code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Groupware_IssueTracker] --> AppInitialization
    
    AppInitialization --> PerformanceAssessment : Start Performance Monitor
    
    PerformanceAssessment --> DeviceCapabilityCheck
    DeviceCapabilityCheck --> InitialModeSelection
    
    InitialModeSelection --> UltraFastMode : Low-end Device
    InitialModeSelection --> FastMode : Mid-range Device
    InitialModeSelection --> BalancedMode : High-end Device
    InitialModeSelection --> HighQualityMode : Premium Device
    
    state UltraFastMode {Groupware_IssueTracker] --> QuarterResolution
        QuarterResolution --> BasicFaceDetection
        BasicFaceDetection --> MinimalProcessing
        MinimalProcessing --> LowBatteryUsage
        LowBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state FastMode {Groupware_KanbanBoard] --> HalfResolution
        HalfResolution --> FaceDetection
        FaceDetection --> BasicNSFWDetection
        BasicNSFWDetection --> ModerateBatteryUsage
        ModerateBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state BalancedMode {Groupware_ChatRoom] --> FullResolution
        FullResolution --> CompleteFaceDetection
        CompleteFaceDetection --> FullNSFWDetection
        FullNSFWDetection --> GenderClassification
        GenderClassification --> OptimalBatteryUsage
        OptimalBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state HighQualityMode {Groupware_WikiPage] --> EnhancedResolution
        EnhancedResolution --> AdvancedFaceDetection
        AdvancedFaceDetection --> EnhancedNSFWDetection
        EnhancedNSFWDetection --> DetailedGenderClassification
        DetailedGenderClassification --> ContentDensityAnalysis
        ContentDensityAnalysis --> HighBatteryUsage
        HighBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    PerformanceMonitoring --> ContinuousMonitoring
    
    state ContinuousMonitoring {Groupware_IssueTracker] --> CPUUsageCheck
        CPUUsageCheck --> MemoryUsageCheck
        MemoryUsageCheck --> BatteryLevelCheck
        BatteryLevelCheck --> ThermalStateCheck
        ThermalStateCheck --> NetworkLatencyCheck
        NetworkLatencyCheck --> PerformanceDecision
    }
    
    PerformanceDecision --> MaintainCurrentMode : Performance Good
    PerformanceDecision --> DegradePerformance : Performance Issues
    PerformanceDecision --> ImprovePerformance : Resources Available
    
    state DegradePerformance {Groupware_IssueTracker] --> ReduceDetectionFrequency
        ReduceDetectionFrequency --> LowerResolution
        LowerResolution --> DisableNonEssentialFeatures
        DisableNonEssentialFeatures --> IncreaseCacheUsage
        IncreaseCacheUsage --> OptimizeMemoryUsage
    }
    
    state ImprovePerformance {Groupware_KanbanBoard] --> IncreaseDetectionQuality
        IncreaseDetectionQuality --> HigherResolution
        HigherResolution --> EnableAdditionalFeatures
        EnableAdditionalFeatures --> ReduceCacheDependency
        ReduceCacheDependency --> EnhancePrecision
    }
    
    DegradePerformance --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    ImprovePerformance --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    MaintainCurrentMode --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    
    state AdaptiveAdjustment {Groupware_KanbanBoard] --> ApplyChanges
        ApplyChanges --> TestNewSettings
        TestNewSettings --> ValidatePerformance
        ValidatePerformance --> UpdateConfiguration
    }
    
    AdaptiveAdjustment --> ContinuousMonitoring : Return to Monitoring
    
    %% Emergency scenarios
    ContinuousMonitoring --> EmergencyMode : Critical Performance Issue
    
    state EmergencyMode {Groupware_SprintBacklog] --> MinimalDetection
        MinimalDetection --> CriticalFeaturesOnly
        CriticalFeaturesOnly --> MaximumCaching
        MaximumCaching --> EmergencyOptimization
        EmergencyOptimization --> GradualRecovery
    }
    
    EmergencyMode --> ContinuousMonitoring : Performance Recovered
    
    %% User-triggered changes
    ContinuousMonitoring --> UserModeChange : User Changes Settings
    
    state UserModeChange {Groupware_ChatRoom] --> ValidateUserChoice
        ValidateUserChoice --> ApplyUserSettings
        ApplyUserSettings --> WarnIfIncompatible
        WarnIfIncompatible --> AcceptOverride
    }
    
    UserModeChange --> ContinuousMonitoring : Settings Applied
    
    %% Battery-specific optimizations
    ContinuousMonitoring --> BatteryOptimization : Low Battery Detected
    
    state BatteryOptimization {Groupware_IssueTracker] --> ReduceProcessingFrequency
        ReduceProcessingFrequency --> DisableBackgroundFeatures
        DisableBackgroundFeatures --> MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks
        MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks --> EnableDeepCaching
        EnableDeepCaching --> BatterySaveMode
    }
    
    BatteryOptimization --> ContinuousMonitoring : Battery Level Improved
    
    %% Thermal management
    ContinuousMonitoring --> ThermalThrottling : Overheating Detected
    
    state ThermalThrottling {Groupware_KanbanBoard] --> ReduceProcessorUsage
        ReduceProcessorUsage --> IncreaseProcessingIntervals
        IncreaseProcessingIntervals --> DisableGPUAcceleration
        DisableGPUAcceleration --> CooldownPause
        CooldownPause --> ThermalRecovery
    }
    
    ThermalThrottling --> ContinuousMonitoring : Temperature Normal
    
    note right of UltraFastMode
        Basic protection with minimal resource usage
        - Face detection only
        - 224x224 resolution
        - 500ms intervals
        - ~2% battery/hour
    end note
    
    note right of BalancedMode
        Recommended mode for most users
        - Full feature set
        - Native resolution
        - 2000ms intervals
        - ~5-8% battery/hour
    end note
    
    note right of HighQualityMode
        Maximum accuracy and features
        - Enhanced processing
        - Content density analysis
        - 3000ms intervals
        - ~12-15% battery/hour
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个自适应图像处理系统的状态机，核心是从应用初始化开始，然后根据设备性能选择不同的处理模式。
明白了，初始化之后先做性能评估和设备检测。那设备分级具体怎么划分？我看到有低端、中端、高端和旗舰四种？
对，分成四档。低端设备走UltraFastMode，只用QuarterResolution和BasicFaceDetection；中端用FastMode，提升到HalfResolution，加上BasicNSFWDetection。
好的，我把这两个模式画成复合状态。UltraFastMode里包含MinimalProcessing和LowBatteryUsage，最后都连接到PerformanceMonitoring。FastMode这边ModerateBatteryUsage也接过去。
BalancedMode是主推模式，用FullResolution做CompleteFaceDetection和FullNSFWDetection，还要加上GenderClassification。这是给高端设备的。
收到，BalancedMode作为复合状态，内部流程是FullResolution→CompleteFaceDetection→FullNSFWDetection→GenderClassification→OptimalBatteryUsage→PerformanceMonitoring。旗舰设备走HighQualityMode对吧？
没错，HighQualityMode用EnhancedResolution，做AdvancedFaceDetection和EnhancedNSFWDetection，还有DetailedGenderClassification，最后要加ContentDensityAnalysis，这是其他模式没有的。
画好了。四个模式都汇总到PerformanceMonitoring，然后进入ContinuousMonitoring循环。这个监控模块需要包含哪些检查项？
ContinuousMonitoring要实时跟踪：CPUUsageCheck、MemoryUsageCheck、BatteryLevelCheck、ThermalStateCheck、NetworkLatencyCheck，最后汇总到PerformanceDecision做判断。
明白了，监控状态内部是链式结构。PerformanceDecision有三个分支：性能良好就MaintainCurrentMode，有问题走DegradePerformance，资源充裕就ImprovePerformance。
对，DegradePerformance要包含ReduceDetectionFrequency、LowerResolution、DisableNonEssentialFeatures、IncreaseCacheUsage、OptimizeMemoryUsage这几个降级步骤。
DegradePerformance画成复合状态了。ImprovePerformance这边是对称的升级路径：IncreaseDetectionQuality、HigherResolution、EnableAdditionalFeatures、ReduceCacheDependency、EnhancePrecision。
两个调整路径最后都要进入AdaptiveAdjustment，这里做ApplyChanges、TestNewSettings、ValidatePerformance、UpdateConfiguration，然后返回ContinuousMonitoring继续监控。
AdaptiveAdjustment也做成复合状态。对了，如果监控发现Critical Performance Issue，是不是需要紧急处理？
是的，要加一个EmergencyMode。触发条件是Critical Performance Issue，进入后做MinimalDetection、CriticalFeaturesOnly、MaximumCaching、EmergencyOptimization，最后GradualRecovery回到ContinuousMonitoring。
EmergencyMode加好了。另外用户主动修改设置的情况怎么处理？
用户触发UserModeChange，走ValidateUserChoice、ApplyUserSettings，如果不兼容要WarnIfIncompatible，用户确认后AcceptOverride，最后回到ContinuousMonitoring。
用户设置分支完成。电池和温度也需要专门处理吧？
Low Battery Detected触发BatteryOptimization，包含ReduceProcessingFrequency、DisableBackgroundFeatures、MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks、EnableDeepCaching，最后进入BatterySaveMode。
BatteryOptimization画好了，电池改善后返回ContinuousMonitoring。温度管理呢？
Overheating Detected走ThermalThrottling，步骤是ReduceProcessorUsage、IncreaseProcessingIntervals、DisableGPUAcceleration、CooldownPause、ThermalRecovery，温度正常后返回监控。
所有分支都完成了。需要给关键模式加注释说明吗？比如UltraFastMode、BalancedMode和HighQualityMode的具体参数。
要加。UltraFastMode注明基础防护、224x224分辨率、500ms间隔、约2%每小时耗电。BalancedMode是推荐模式，原生分辨率、2000ms间隔、5-8%每小时耗电。
注释已添加。HighQualityMode这边写最大精度和功能、增强处理、内容密度分析、3000ms间隔、12-15%每小时耗电，对吗？
对，参数准确。整个状态机结构检查一下：从AppInitialization出发，四档设备选择，各自处理流程汇入PerformanceMonitoring，进入ContinuousMonitoring循环，根据决策可维持、降级或升级，还有紧急模式、用户设置、电池优化、温度节流四个特殊分支。
确认一下，所有复合状态里的Groupware标记需要保留吗？比如UltraFastMode里的Groupware_IssueTracker，FastMode里的Groupware_KanbanBoard这些。
保留，这些标记对应不同协作工具场景。IssueTracker用于快速响应场景，KanbanBoard用于任务管理，ChatRoom用于实时沟通，WikiPage用于文档协作，SprintBacklog用于紧急迭代。
完成。状态图已包含所有复合状态、转换条件和注释，各Groupware场景标记也已对应到相应模式中。
